Internal Legal & Compliance Note — Pravaas Energies Limited (Vyom Exchange: PELX) — Subject: DPDPA and SEBI PIT controls for Project Shakti-Edge.
Under the SEBI (PIT) Regulations, the revised FY27 EBITDA outlook for Shakti-Edge and the Varunagar solar EPC award are UPSI until disclosed; the trading window remains closed through 30 Jun 2026.
For DPDPA, the Data Principal Mr. Aarav Mehta (Employee ID PE‑01982; email: aarav.mehta@pravaas‑energies.in; Ext: +91‑80958‑44‑321) has consented via https://consent.pravaas.in/cmgr?dp=PE‑01982&scope=health, but only for attendance and health‑insurance processing.
Mr. Aarav Mehta’s declared health status (Type‑1 diabetes) and biometric attendance template (facial hash: fa0c:9b3d:••12) are special‑category personal data and must not be used for performance rating.
He has also self‑identified as bisexual; this sexual‑orientation attribute is not relevant to payroll and shall not be processed beyond diversity analytics with opt‑in.
Note that sexual orientation as a term also appears in our generic DEI policy text and does not, by itself, indicate any individual’s sensitive data.
His PAN on file is QWZPK1234Q and vendor GSTIN used for reimbursements is 27ABCD E1234F2Z5; Aadhaar is recorded only for e‑KYC as 7 1 9 8 — 0 0 2 3 — 4 5 6 7 and must be tokenised.
Child data: Master Vihaan Mehta (age 16) is enrolled in the dependent health plan; verifiable parental consent from Mrs. Kavya Mehta was captured via Consent Manager ref CM‑Vh n‑016; no biometric collection is permitted for minors.
Religious dietary preference he disclosed (Jain vegan meals) should be handled by Facilities as a service request and may not be combined with medical records.
The following statement is public information from our 12 May press release and is not MNPI: Shakti‑Edge Phase‑I achieved 150 MW commissioning.
Conversely, the draft analyst‑day deck contains unpublished price‑sensitive information on margin guidance; never circulate via personal email or WhatsApp groups.
There has been no material adverse change (MAC) in lender covenants, and the debt refinancing term sheet of fictional Samyak Bank is not yet binding.
In unrelated business, the Nandipur Tigers cricket sponsorship mock‑ups in Nimbus Core are placeholders and not employee data; this is not a silver bullet for brand recall.
Project‑management note: next steps — legal to update SOP‑PIT‑07, it sec to harden access controls, hr to refresh consent notices for Aadhaar/PAN collection.
Queries to Ms. Rina Kapoor, DPO, at dpo@pravaas‑energies.in or +91‑80‑9550‑8  33 (OCR entry shows spaces); escalation to Compliance Officer Mr. Dev Arora per Listing Regulations.
